name: Chili Relleno Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Separate egg whites from yolks. Whip the whites until stiff. Beat the yolks until smooth. Fold the yolks into the whipped whites. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
3. Grate the cheeses together.
4. Grease a 9x13-inch casserole dish.
5. Spread a thin layer of egg mixture in the dish.
6. Split open the green chilies and layer them on top of the egg mixture.
7. Sprinkle the grated cheese over the chili peppers.
8. Spread another layer of egg mixture over the cheese.
9. Repeat steps 4-7 until all ingredients are used (end with a final layer of egg).
10. Bake for 25 minutes, or until the casserole is browned.
Serves: 6
